ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the listener */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Song ID of the song listened to */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Song ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Song ID of the song */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to process the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provenance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provenance entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Song ID of the song */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio feature */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)
